# Test Fixtures

HGVS parser test cases extracted from established implementations.

## Sources

### biocommons.json

Test cases from [biocommons/hgvs](https://github.com/biocommons/hgvs).

- **License:** Apache-2.0
- **Source files:** `tests/data/grammar_test.tsv`, parser gauntlet
- **Cases:** 30

### ferro_hgvs.json

Test cases from [varfish-org/hgvs-rs](https://github.com/varfish-org/hgvs-rs) (ferro-hgvs).

- **License:** Apache-2.0
- **Source files:** `tests/data/`, ClinVar bulk samples
- **Cases:** 377

### equivalence_groups.json

N-way equivalence groups verifying that different HGVS representations
of the same variant produce identical VRS IDs.

- **License:** Same as gtars (BSD-2-Clause)
- **Generated by:** `tests/data/hgvs/synthetic/generate.py`
- **Groups:** 23 (60 member rows)

## Format

All files are JSON arrays. Parser test cases have:
```json
{"input": "NC_000001.11:g.123A>T", "valid": true, "source": "..."}
```

Equivalence groups have:
```json
{"group_id": "eq_fwd_sub_001", "member_kind": "hgvs_g", "expression": "...", "expected_vrs_id": "..."}
```
